response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:39: Identified Nekomata Okayu performing a song. Subtitles suggest the song title is 'Atashi'. 2. 03:39-04:00: Transition scene. 3. 04:00-05:00: Identified 'Monitoring' by DECO*27 through on-screen text. 4. Searched for 'Monitoring DECO*27 lyrics'. Found complete lyrics. 5. Lyrics for 'Atashi' were not found, transcribed from video.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a virtual YouTuber, Nekomata Okayu, performing two songs in a 3D concert setting, celebrating her 2026 birthday. The songs are 'Atashi' and 'Monitoring'.

scenes.description: Nekomata Okayu performs her original song 'Atashi' on a 3D concert stage. She dances while singing. Text '猫又おかゆ生誕祭2026' appears on screen.

scenes.description: A short transition scene where the camera zooms into a screen on stage showing Nekomata Okayu preparing for the next performance. Text 'モニタリング' and '作詞・作曲:DECO*27' appears.
Nekomata Okayu performs the song 'Monitoring' originally by DECO*27 on the concert stage. She enters a screen/bubble effect to perform this song.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, I know. I know you're alone and 'xx'-ing. I know.
You're trembling, and your voice is leaking out, you know.
Just honestly say it. It's already exposed, so just say it. Is it working?
Normal, normal, is it embarrassing? Everyone is just hiding it. (Muffuu)
Hey, I know. I know you're alone and 'crying'. I know.
Sobbing, sobbing, you're depressed, and talking to yourself in the night.
We'll stay together until morning. Even if you cry more,
I'll accept it no matter how many times.
Don't hold it in anymore, let it all out. Mwah!
Please, I want you.
Let me comfort you, shake shake, with the talent of love.
If you don't cry for me, I'll dry up. I want to be wet.
Hey, that's fine, right? I want to lick it up and drink it dry.
[...]
